title: Proof Stamp Button
prompt:
Create a production-ready Proof Stamp Button using TypeScript React, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion. This original control lets a reviewer mark a concise evidence packet as checked. Before activation it shows an outlined stamp with the label Mark checked; after activation, a coral checkmark settles inside the stamp and the label becomes Checked. Keep a plain-language status sentence beneath the control so the confirmation is never communicated by color alone. Place it in a light Bento composition: #F4F5F6 stage, white surface, #ECECEE border, 22px corners, soft neutral shadow, #111111 primary text, and #4A4A4F supporting copy. Coral is the sole bright accent, and neither the card nor button may use a gradient.

Use one native button with a 44px minimum target, aria-pressed, an explicit accessible name, and an aria-live polite status. Click, Enter, and Space must toggle safely. Animate the stamp scale and checkmark with a spring using stiffness 350 and damping 25; fade the label over 150ms ease-out and use a 90ms press scale of 0.98. Keep all state local and deterministic: no timers, random values, storage, remote assets, network requests, or layout measurement. Favor transform and opacity.

At 320px, preserve the full label and stamp without clipping; at a wide detail preview, allow a comfortable maximum width. Include a visible 3px focus ring, logical tab order, AA contrast, and both text and shape cues. Respect prefers-reduced-motion by snapping the stamp and retaining only a brief opacity fade. Return complete paste-ready client code, a runnable pure CSS approximation, and suggested HTML.

code.css:
/* HTML: <button class="proof-stamp" aria-pressed="false">Mark checked</button> */
.proof-stamp{min-height:48px;border:2px solid #111;border-radius:16px;background:#fff;color:#111;font-weight:800}.proof-stamp::before{display:inline-grid;width:24px;height:24px;margin-right:10px;border:2px solid #111;border-radius:7px;place-items:center;content:""}.proof-stamp[aria-pressed=true]::before{border-color:#ff6b5f;content:"✓"}.proof-stamp:focus-visible{outline:3px solid #111;outline-offset:4px}@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){.proof-stamp{transition:none}}

demoCode:
(() => {function Demo(){const [c,setC]=React.useState(false);return
REVIEW PACKET

{c?'Proof is marked as checked.':'Proof still needs a check.'}

}return ;})()
